name: kube_metrics_server
explanation: kube-metrics-server is a Kubernetes API extension server that exposes Prometheus metrics on a fixed path (/metrics) over HTTPS on port 443. The spec uses the openmetrics_legacy template and the example URL is https://%%host%%:443/metrics, indicating a single canonical endpoint. The check inherits OpenMetricsBaseCheck. Discovery reduces to scraping https://<pod_ip>:443/metrics on a discovered metrics-server pod.
notes: Pattern A (OpenMetrics on a known port). TLS server certs are typically self-signed in-cluster, so the discovery probe should accept TLS without strict verification, matching the autodiscovery convention for other Kubernetes-internal targets.
